latin: Chihiro nomen suum oblivisci coeperat. Haku eam monuit: 'nomen tuum tene — si oblita eris, numquam domum redibis.' nomen est res potentissima in mundo spirituum.

questions.prompt: What was Chihiro beginning to forget?

questions.target: If she forgets her name she can never return home
choices: If she forgets her name she can never return home
She will turn into an animal

translation: Chihiro had begun to forget her name. Haku warned her: 'Keep your name — if you forget it, you will never return home.' A name is the most powerful thing in the world of spirits.
